_comment: MAINTAIN MANUALLY EVERY SATURDAY before running. List NIFTY-50 names that announced Q-results in the last 5 trading days. Source: nseindia.com/companies-listing/corporate-filings-financial-results. Surprise = (actual_eps - consensus_eps) / |consensus_eps|. day_of_week is the announcement day (Friday triggers DellaVigna-Pollet bonus). same_day_count is the count of NIFTY-50 firms reporting on the same day (>10 triggers Hirshleifer-Lim-Teoh distraction bonus).
